chunks.title: Idolatry at Shittim and the Plague
chunks.reason: Describes the Israelites' idolatry with Moabite women, the resulting plague, and Phinehas's intervention to stop it.

chunks.title: Covenant of Peace for Phinehas
chunks.reason: Combines Yahweh's speech granting a perpetual priesthood to Phinehas with specific identification of the slain couple.

chunks.title: Command Against Midian
chunks.reason: Yahweh commands Moses to be hostile toward the Midianites due to their role in the Peor incident.
